parameters.query:
INSERT INTO knowledge_chunk (document_id, chunk_index, text, token_count, metadata, embedding)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5::jsonb, $6::vector)
ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
RETURNING id
parameters.queryParams: ={{ $('Chunk Text').item.json.documentId }},={{ $('Chunk Text').item.json.chunkIndex }},={{ $('Chunk Text').item.json.text }},={{ $('Chunk Text').item.json.tokenCount }},={{ JSON.stringify($('Chunk Text').item.json.metadata) }},={{ JSON.stringify($json.data[0].embedding) }}

parameters.query: UPDATE knowledge_document SET status='active', last_ingested_at=NOW() WHERE id=$1
